title: galium rubrum subsp. obliquum
intro: Galium rubrum subsp. obliquum is a subspecies of the Galium rubrum, commonly known as the red bedstraw or red bedstraw subsp. obliquum, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galium rubrum subsp. obliquum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
